title: The Mod OF ANAS
description: Adds me, the creator of the mod to the game
body: Adds ME the creator of this mod, a overpowered sword, blocks with SCARY noises and a bow that doesn't work and I dont know how to fit it and wont fix it. It doesn't help yoou in your journey whatsoever and doesn't help you at all, so don't download it. I just want to see myself fail for the first time. I hope you don't enjoy it.
